features: The deodorant body spray offers a refreshing, aromatic fragrance experience with essential lemon oil
The formula is vegan, dermatologically tested and contains 0 percent aluminium salts
The After Sport deodorant body spray protects clothes and leaves no stains
description: Product Description The adidas After Sport deodorant body spray for him offers extra long-lasting freshness and with aromatic fragrance for up to 48 hours. Leaves no residue and is suitable for sensitive skin. Manufacturer Contact Information 14 rue du Quatre Septembre, 75002 Paris
